sys_script_include.description:
2.8.5 | 2024-10-14 | RAJ | STRY0154923 - Workflow Issue - move all updates that require additional processing into an event. Remove setWorkflow(false) from task object This contains business rules for the task table - The first iteration handles all after update calls to process child, parent and task changes related to an update - The first iteration handles the initial call from after insert update to build an object passed into an after update event - The first iteration also contains the functions called when the event triggers
- A future iteration will move the before methods into here so the business rules are managed in a single place
sys_script_include.name: business_rule_task
